title: Let It Be
lyrics: When I find myself in times of trouble, Mother Mary comes to me, speaking words of wisdom, let it be.

title: Hey Jude
lyrics: Hey Jude, don't make it bad. Take a sad song and make it better...

title: Yesterday
lyrics: Yesterday, all my troubles seemed so far away. Now it looks as though they're here to stay...

title: Hotel California
lyrics: On a dark desert highway, cool wind in my hair. Warm smell of colitas rising up through the air...

title: Desperado
lyrics: Desperado, why don't you come to your senses? You've been out riding fences for so long now...

title: Hallelujah
lyrics: Now I've heard there was a secret chord that David played, and it pleased the Lord...

title: Suzanne
lyrics: Suzanne takes you down to her place near the river. You can hear the boats go by...

title: Billie Jean
lyrics: Billie Jean is not my lover, she's just a girl who claims that I am the one...

title: Thriller
lyrics: Cause this is thriller, thriller night. And no one's gonna save you from the beast about to strike...

title: Man in the Mirror
lyrics: I'm starting with the man in the mirror. I'm asking him to change his ways...
